ValidationRule.description: prevents editing of a quote if the status is ordered
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( AND( BEGINS(NATT_Quote_Record_Type_Developer_Name__c, "NATT_"), NOT( OR( BEGINS(NATT_Quote_Record_Type_Developer_Name__c, "NATT_Units") ) ) ), TEXT(SBQQ__Status__c) = "Ordered", NOT(ISCHANGED(SBQQ__Status__c)), NOT(ISNEW()), $Permission.NATT_Modify_Ordered_Quotes = FALSE )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: You may not modify an ordered quote.
